name: ames-unifi
description: UniFi Network MCP connector for controller management, clients, devices, firewall, Wi-Fi, VPN, switching, hotspot, and traffic tools.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Claude and Codex to UniFi Network controllers.
interface.longDescription: A UniFi Network MCP connector for deep, permission-aware controller management across clients, devices, firewall, Wi-Fi, VPN, switching, hotspot, traffic, events, and system workflows. Requires UNIFI_HOST plus either UNIFI_API_KEY or username/password credentials.
